'''Mister Mxil''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] from [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] who found sanctuary on [[Port Haven/Legends|Port Haven]] where [[Gender/Legends|he]] operated the only tavern, [[Haven's Water]].

Before he went to Port Haven, he was the chief steward onboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']], where he was responsible for the preparation of meals, stocking of the bars and contentment of the passengers with regard to eating.

When Mister Mxil spoke out against the [[Slavery/Legends|enslavement]] of his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], he was forced to become a refugee from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. When he arrived at Port Haven he learned the way of the [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] with the help from [[Hallomar]], the ''de facto'' governor of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] outpost. He reconstructed one of the larger buildings on Port Haven to open the Haven's Water to serve the visiting spacers. The tavern served drinks produced from ingredients found in the nearby jungle. Some mornings he was known to walk to the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] for a refreshing swim or sit on the [[Beach/Legends|beach]], [[Meditation/Legends|meditating]].
